title: B-PLOT 2 — Papa lets go, Eva pedals solo
prompt: Wide tracking shot in @bike_circle, golden hour light. @Eva pedals forward on @eva-bike, both hands on the handlebars, white helmet on, eyes wide with joyful focus. @Papa stands in the BACKGROUND with arms wide open, having just let go, face glowing with pride. Papa (cheering): "You're doing it! All by yourself!" Eva (squealing): "I'M DOING IT! I'M DOING IT!" Triumphant music swell, lens flare.
